title: 12 Pcs Happy Mothers Day Balloons, Mother's Day Foil Balloons Mother's day Party Decorations, Large Aluminum Foil Floral Balloons for Birthday Mother's Day Party Decorations (18 Inch)
features: Quantity and Style: You will get 12 pieces mothers day balloons decorations with 4 styles, the size of the balloons is 18 inch, large enough to attract attention.

High Quality Material: Made of aluminum mylar foil material, durable long lasting use; fill them with air or helium, the maximum size after inflation is 18inch/46cm. Decorate the entire Mother's Day time slot and even the next Mother's Day

Beautiful Design: Happy mothers balloons are printed with a lot of cute patterns, including hearts, flowers, crown, etc., with bright colors, which are charming and conspicuous; The text is simple and warm, suitable for dressing up for Mother's Day.

Easy to inflate: Self-sealing, just pinch the opening of the balloon after inflation, the adhesive in the opening of the balloon will automatically seal, very convenient to use, not easy to leak, can be kept for a long time, as a beautiful decoration for many days

Happy decorations supplies: Use these beautiful heart balloons to decorate on walls, doors, windows; or hang on ceilings, closets, or use as backgrounds or props for photoshoots, perfect for mother's day, mom themed parties, birthday parties, family gatherings etc.
